why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official table assigns minecraft:container_set_slot to packet id 0x14, and the official ClientboundContainerSetSlotPacket empty ItemStack fixture encodes framed bytes 14077b000400 with body 077b000400 for containerId 7, stateId 123, slot 4, and an empty item marker. Stevenarella must dispatch that official id/body without panicking and consume the full body.
what: The exact Rust oracle test did not compile because steven_protocol::protocol::packet::Packet has no PlayContainerSetSlotClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound container_set_slot surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00 through minecraft:container_set_data / 0x13, but not minecraft:container_set_slot / 0x14.

play_clientbound_container_set_slot.official_fixture: official ClientboundContainerSetSlotPacket(int, int, int, ItemStack) constructor fixture with ItemStack.EMPTY; no initialized Menu, screen, Level, inventory, item registry entry, component registry, or game state
play_clientbound_container_set_slot.official_body_shape: containerId encoded by RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.writeContainerId/readContainerId, stateId encoded by RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.writeVarInt/readVarInt, slot encoded by RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.writeShort/readShort, and itemStack encoded by ItemStack.OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC; this fixture uses the empty stack marker

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundContainerSetSlotPacket(int, int, int, ItemStack), ClientboundContainerSetSlotPacket.STREAM_CODEC, private RegistryFriendlyByteBuf constructor/write methods, ItemStack.OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(...).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleContainerSetSlot(ClientboundContainerSetSlotPacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound container_set_slot dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter through 0x13 container_set_data, but not official packet id 0x14 container_set_slot.
Current Packet enum has no Play container_set_slot packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 container id, state id, slot, and empty item fixture.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayContainerSetSlotClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
